payload.description: Replace the current MCP-loopback implementation of plexus.feedback.find inside PlexusRuntimeModule with a direct call to FeedbackService.search_feedback + FeedbackService.format_search_result_as_dict, using shared client setup (create_client, resolve_account_id_for_command, memoized scorecard/score resolvers). Add focused tests with an injectable service. The MCP-backed path should be removed once the direct path is in, with no fallback.
payload.title: Wire plexus.feedback.find to FeedbackService.search_feedback directly
